title: Configure Supabase
description: Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env (see README Quick Start). Enable auth providers in the Supabase dashboard. For Google OAuth, follow documentation/DOC_SUPABASE_GOOGLE_OAUTH.md. Verify auth via ProfileMenu sign-in once configured.

title: Configure Hosting
description: Deploy via Cloudflare Workers Builds (push-to-deploy; GitHub is CI gate only). Rename `name` in wrangler.jsonc, connect the repo in the Cloudflare dashboard (Build `pnpm install && pnpm run build`, Deploy `npx wrangler deploy`, Root directory EMPTY), set NODE_VERSION=20 + CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID + VITE_* build vars, add the deployed origin to Supabase Auth URLs. Full guide: documentation/DOC_CLOUDFLARE_WORKERS.md.

title: Define app vision
description: Collaborate with the coding agent to fill documentation/DOC_APP_VISION.md (problem, persona, app role). Replace placeholder bullets with real prose and change Vision status from DRAFT to ACTIVE when complete.

title: Configure Airtable (optional)
description: Optional — skip or archive this task if unused. Add VITE_AIRTABLE_API_KEY, VITE_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID, and VITE_AIRTABLE_TABLE_ID to .env. Use .agents/skills/airtable-inspect/SKILL.md for schema then sample rows.

title: Configure Theme
description: Customize MUI theme via src/shared/theme/ (themeLoader.ts and related tokens). Match brand colors, typography, and dark/light mode defaults. Verify changes in the running dev app.
